topics.title: No personal income tax
topics.summary: Saudi Arabia levies no personal income tax on salaries for residents, whether Saudi nationals or expats.

topics.title: GOSI social insurance
topics.summary: Saudi nationals: 9% pension + 1% unemployment (SANED) = 10% employee share; matched by employer. Expats: employer pays 2% occupational hazards only.

topics.title: Zakat
topics.summary: 2.5% religious levy on zakatable wealth. Legally binding for Saudi/GCC companies; individual Zakat is self-assessed.

topics.title: VAT
topics.summary: 15% standard VAT (raised from 5% in July 2020). Registration threshold SAR 375,000 in taxable supplies.

topics.title: Withholding tax (WHT)
topics.summary: Payments to non-residents: 5% (services), 15% (royalties), 20% (management fees). Treaty reductions may apply.
